constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient

reference_templates.title: Disabled decoy field
reference_templates.notes: Disabled name field looks required but cannot be filled; active duplicate below
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Disabled decoy

reference_templates.title: Split date selects
reference_templates.notes: Start date as three separate day/month/year select elements
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Split date selects

Earliest start date

reference_templates.title: Aria describedby hints
reference_templates.notes: Fields use aria-describedby for format hints separate from label
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Describedby hints

Include country code, e.g. +44 7700 900000

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real taleo-style job application (wizard, large, tier=high). Widgets: native-inputs, location-typeahead, checkbox-group. Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Reference DOM (Disabled decoy field): Disabled name field looks required but cannot be filled; active duplicate below Reference DOM (Split date selects): Start date as three separate day/month/year select elements Reference DOM (Aria describedby hints): Fields use aria-describedby for format hints separate from label Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: readonly-prefill, aria-label-only, glued-label-text, iframe-apply, native-select-not-combobox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Disabled decoy field; Split date selects; Aria describedby hints.
